title: Feed ScenePack into planner context without changing planner API
description:
Integrate the ScenePack into the planning layer so decomposers and goals have access to rich situational context without changing the planner's interface contract.

Implementation:
1. Add `ScenePack?` to the planning context object passed to `IPlanner.PlanAsync` (or attach to `WorldState` via an extension/companion).
2. Update `PlannerRouter` to extract relevant ScenePack fields before delegating to decomposers.
3. Update `BuildGoalDecomposer` to use ScenePack for:
   - Nearby flat area candidates (already in WorldState facts)
   - Entity presence near the build site (avoid building in zombie crowds)
4. Update `GatherGoalDecomposer` to use ScenePack for:
   - Nearby entity threats (pause gathering if hostile mobs are close)
   - Memory references for known resource locations
5. Update `HtnPlanner` fallback to pass ScenePack through to task library methods.
6. Do NOT change the `IPlanner` interface signature — attach the pack to the planning context object or a companion property on WorldState.

Acceptance:
- Planner has access to entity and scene data without API breakage.
- Decomposers can query nearby entities.
- No regression in existing planner tests.

Refs: `memorysmith_situational_awareness_design_doc_20260625T020914Z.md` Phase 3
